feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP BTP: How to set up alert on database resident memory and database used memory
entry.content:
We need help.
We are currently using SAP BTP and are looking for a way to automatically monitor the memory used in the database (database resident memory, database used memory), and send an alert and email when a certain amount of usage is detected.

Here are the specifications:

  • Using HANA Cloud as the database.
  • Currently, each memory is manually monitored from the Memory Usage section in HANA Cockpit.

Since the memory we want to set alerts for is standard, I thought there might be a default alert function, so I looked in HANA Cockpit under alert > alert definition, but I couldn't find it.

I would like to know if this is something that should be implemented by default in the alert definition, or if it is something that users need to create. If we need to create the alert, please let us know the steps to do so (preferably without using SQL commands, if possible).

entry.title: Please let me know which time synchronization solution use in BTP cloud foundry
entry.content:
We have requested from customer what time synchronization solution we use. (example NTP: network time protocol)
I couldn't find what functions were provided in the manual (BTP Cloud foundry).
Customer want answer to their questions before system open and use.
Are there any solutions like NTP in BTP Cloud foundry that we use? we need even simple answer (example: we control time sync in BTP level)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial API management configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting the following error when tried configuring API management capability of Integration suite. Any advice on how to configure this?

entry.title: SAP Dynamic Forms Merge Functionality
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have tried creating a Form using form builder in SAP Dynamic Forms and we are able to successfully do it. We have also created a Template separately. When we are trying to Merge the template into the form we are not getting the merge option in the Form Builder. Attaching the screenshot for your reference.

How it should be like: 

 

We are Actually Getting like: 

 

 

Could you please help us on the steps how to get the Merge option.

Thanks,

V Pranaya Panni

entry.title: Typescript + cds typer are throwing the error Property 'before' does not exist on type 'Service'
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I'm updating the libraries of my fullstack application and found that something is not working well. I added cds-typer by using cds add command. I updated all libraries to last version

"@ash_G/cds": "^8.2.3",
"@ash_G/cds-dk": "^8.2.3",
"@cap-js/cds-typer": ">=0.26.0"
 
But it seems it's not recognising the handlers from the service, please can you support on this ??
To execute the code i vscode I'm using cds-tsx command.
 Thanks a lot in advance.

entry.title: Integration between S/4Hana Public Cloud and non-SAP dashboard application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to the Integration topic and I would like to get a possible solution to enable a third party dashboard application to access data from the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

I am aware that S/4HANA Cloud provides pre-delivered APIs which could be leveraged. Or custom CDS Views could be built from whitelisted CDS Views and exposed as OData service to be consumed. Is SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) required for this?

entry.title: S/4 HANA Application job scheduling based on condition/event
entry.content:
Hi,

S/4 HANA private cloud system.

We are checking the option to schedule the S/4 HANA application job based on some condition/event because we are having some dependency from other systems job completion status (SuccessFactor, IBP, etc.,) .

We didn't see the event/condition based scheduling options in Application Jobs FIORI app.

Is there any possibility to start S/4 HANA application jobs based on completion of dependency jobs from other systems?

Best Regards,

Anand

entry.title: SAP BTP Build Work Zone (standard) - Fiori tiles keeps loading after expose from S/4HANA system.
entry.content:
Hi,

We use the BTP Service, SAP Build Work Zone (standard). We have set up catalogues, spaces and pages and roles on the S/4HANA system on premise. After these configurations we performed an expose via the SAP transaction /ui2/cdm3_exp_scope so that the apps are visible in build work zone.

What we see now is that some analytical tiles keeps loading. Does anyone have experience with this and does anyone have any tips on how to solve this?

Best regards,

Gene

entry.title: Can Azure AD be used in SAP Task Center config in place of SAP Identity Services for User Auth
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have to configure SAP task Center for my S4 system which is connected via Cloud Connector to subaccount where task center instance is running. I have gone through lot's of notes and Blog's but everywhere its written that we need to have & use SAP Cloud Identity Services as a prerequisite for SAP Task Center and the integration with the task providers. But in our case we use Custom identity Provider .i.e Azure AD. So we want to make use of Azure AD in place of SAP Cloud Identity Services. Guys please comments your views if it possible and if yes then how we can use it.

entry.title: Configure an SAP CAP Application to Connect to an SAP HANA Cloud Database in Another Global Account
entry.content:
How to Configure an SAP CAP Application to Connect to an SAP HANA Cloud Database in Another Global Account or Subaccount Without HDI

When your SAP HANA Cloud database is in another Global Account or subaccount, which prevents the natural use of the HDI container for database object management, you need to follow the steps below to configure your SAP CAP application and achieve a successful connection.

Step 1: Configure a User-Provided Service

It is essential to create a user-provided service using the Cloud Foundry command line. This is important because SAP CAP requires the service to have three specific tags to automatically determine which configuration to use.

Run the following command:

cf create-user-provided-service ups-database-external -t "hana,database,relational"
  • ups-database-external: This is the name you assign to your service.
  • -t "hana,database,relational": These are the tags that CAP uses to identify the database service.

Step 2: Modify the Service's JSON in SAP BTP

After creating the service via the command line, you need to specify the connection data in the service's JSON in SAP BTP.

The JSON should contain the following:

{
  "encrypt": true,
  "host": "your-hana-cloud-host",
  "password": "your-password",
  "port": "443",
  "schema": "YOUR_SCHEMA_NAME",
  "sslValidateCertificate": true,
  "user": "your-username"
}
  • host: The address of your SAP HANA Cloud instance.
  • user and password: The credentials of the user with permissions to access the database schema.
  • schema: The schema where your database objects are located or will be created.
  • encrypt and sslValidateCertificate: Settings to ensure the connection is secure via SSL/TLS.
  • port: The connection port, generally "443" for secure connections.

Step 3: Modify package.json or .cdsrc.json

You need to tell SAP CAP which service to use to obtain the credentials. This is done by modifying your project's package.json or .cdsrc.json file.

Add or update the "requires" section as follows:

{
  "requires": {
    "db": {
      "kind": "hana",
      "credentials": {
        "service": "ups-database-external"
      }
    },
    "[production]": {
      "auth": "xsuaa",
      "db": {
        "kind": "hana",
        "credentials": {
          "service": "ups-database-external"
        }
      },
      "data": false
    }
  }
}
  • "service": "ups-database-external": Indicates to CAP that it should use the provided service named ups-database-external.
  • "[production]": Ensures that the same configuration is used in the production profile.

Step 4: Remove HDI-Related Configurations

Since you are not using HDI for database object management, you need to remove all references and configurations related to HDI in your mta.yaml file or your project's deployment configurations.

This includes:

  • Removing modules or resources that create or manage HDI containers.
  • Deleting dependencies between modules and HDI resources.

Step 5: Bind the Service to the CAP Application Instance in SAP BTP

For your CAP application to take the specified credentials and configuration, you need to bind the provided service to your application's instance in SAP BTP.

You can do this in two ways:

Option 1: Manual Binding

After deploying the application, run the command:

cf bind-service your-application-name ubs-database-external

Then, restart your application:

cf restart your-application-name

Option 2: Automatic Binding in mta.yaml

Add the binding in your mta.yaml file so that it is performed automatically during deployment.

Example of how to define the binding in mta.yaml:

modules:
  - name: your-application-name
    type: nodejs
    path: .
    requires:
      - name: ups-database-external
resources:
  - name: ups-database-external
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: user-provided
      service-name: ups-database-external

Step 6: Manually Deploy the Database Objects

Since you are not using HDI, you need to manually deploy the database objects in your SAP HANA Cloud instance.

1. Generate the SQL Scripts

From your CDS models, generate the SQL scripts using the following commands:

cds compile db/ --to sql --src db cds compile srv/ --to sql --src srv

These commands generate SQL scripts from your model definitions in the db/ and srv/ directories.

2. Execute the Scripts in the Database Console

  • Access SAP HANA Database Explorer.
  • Connect to your SAP HANA Cloud instance.
  • Execute the generated SQL scripts to create the necessary tables and views in your schema.

entry.title: SAP build Process Automation
entry.content: state:false

entry.title: MyInbox in the SAP Build Work Zone lists tasks, but does not display them.
entry.content:
I have subscribet to SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Workzone in the same Subaccount. 

On my Work Zone Site i added the Process Trigger and MyInbox component. The Process Trigger works fine but MyInbox isn't working correctly. It lists the assigend Task of an User on the left menue but nothing happens when i click on them to work on the forms.

I created an Destination on the subaccount für SAP Build Process Automation in preparation for MyInbox on Work Zone.

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Workzone BPA task error "Failed to resolve dependencies of 'CrossApplicationNavigation.js'"
entry.content:
Dear Community,
since Monday I can’t see custom tasks in Workzone in some clients' sub-accounts.

The error I see in the browser console is:
Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/ushell/appRuntime/ui5/services/CrossApplicationNavigation.js'

Tasks are correctly viewable on use MyInbox of BPA.

Does anyone else have this error?

@Archana Could it be due to some update over the weekend?

Best Regards

entry.title: Unable to load tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to access below tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html

On click of the tutorial to expand it, Its not loading at all.

I could see few errors in the browser console:


I tried using different browsers, signed in, and signed out, but it's not helping.

Can someone suggest how to access this tutorial?

Thanks
Vivek Rawat

entry.title: SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
When I open a BAS session, I can't see the Cloud Foundry icons in the left column.

I'm using a trial version.

Anything am I missing?

Thanks!

entry.title: Subscription failed for Build Process Automation for Singapore AWS region
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am not able to subscribe for SAP Build Process Automation Service in BTP Trial account for Singapore region. Can someone please help?

entry.title: Cant access transaction in WEBGui for HTML via SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

i am trying to set up SAP build work zone to access SAP Gui transactions but i get this message when I try to open the App i created for my Website.

This is the app im trying to open:

 

Destination im using for the System in BTP

Cloud Connector connection config Cloud to on Prem:

 

Regards

Rouven

entry.title: How to transport custom role collections between BTP subaccounts through Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
We have a requirement to transport the custom build role collections from  Dev BTP subaccount to Quality Sub account through Cloud Transport Management.

How can we achieve this?

Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: Platform user for Destination WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I configured the destination WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER according to the documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-destination-for-live-process-projects 

When I entered my Universal ID mail address and password, it was working. The Check Connection shows: Connection to "WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER" established. Response returned: "404: Not Found", so no 401 anymore.

The documentation says, I should use a platform user from the default identity provider and that I should not use a SAP Universal ID user. However the only way I got this destination working was to enter my Universal ID information.

As this destination is shared in the whole subaccount I would like to create a different user and add this to this destination (That's also what the BTP cockpit advices me to do).

Where should I create such a user? The only way I can think of is creating it as a Universal ID user, however  the documentation tells me I should not use a Universal ID user. Also, this requires me to create another mail address to keep the user separate from my Universal ID which is not nice.

entry.title: X12 License for Trial Account
entry.content:
I am using trial account for BTP Cockpit and Integration Suite, for learning purpose.

Type System “ASC X12” is showing “Unlicensed”.

Any idea, how I can obtain license for my trial account.

Thanks, Fahar
